_meta.name: English
_meta.$comment: v1.1 PR-B populated this with ~110 strings extracted from components. New namespaces follow the convention in docs/i18n-conventions.md. Brand marks ('Antoine', 'CulinAIre Kitchen', 'LITE') stay as literals in source — they are names, not translatable copy.

auth.registerTagline: A line that runs itself once you let it.
auth.termsAndPrivacy: By continuing you agree to the <termsLink>Terms</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
auth.verifyBody: We sent a verification link to <emailEm>{{email}}</emailEm>. Open it from your inbox to activate your account.
auth.forgotPasswordBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new one.
auth.checkInboxBody: If an account exists at <emailEm>{{email}}</emailEm>, a reset link is on its way. Tap the link to set a new password.
auth.resetPasswordBody: Paste the code from the reset email, then choose a new password (at least 8 characters).
auth.resetPasswordSuccessBody: You can sign in with your new password now.
auth.mfaBody: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

chat.greeting: How can I help you today?
chat.emptyHistory: No conversations yet. Start one from the chat screen.
chat.confirmDeleteBody: This conversation and its messages will be permanently deleted.
chat.confirmClearAllBody: Every conversation and its messages will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
chat.partialLanguageTitle: Replies are in English for now
chat.partialLanguageBody: We haven't published an Antoine in {{language}} yet. Your conversation still works — Antoine just answers in English until the {{language}} translation lands.

settings.title: Settings
settings.wifiOnlyEnabled: Downloads pause until Wi-Fi is back.
settings.cellularWarningBody: Antoine is about 6 GB. Downloading on cellular may use significant data and could be slow.

legal.unavailableBody: We're finalising the copy for this page. Try again in a minute, or check back after launch.
legal.errorBody: Check your connection and try again. If the issue persists, the page is being updated on our side.

chef.downloadingBody: Downloading once, then everything happens on your phone — no internet needed to cook with {{assistantName}}.

welcome.slide1Body: CulinAIre Kitchen is your on-device culinary intelligence. Calm, precise, and yours alone.
welcome.slide2Title: Your recipes never leave the phone.
welcome.slide2Body: Antoine runs locally. No cloud calls during inference. Your kitchen stays private by default.
welcome.slide3Body: Ask in plain language: a broken hollandaise, a 12-cover dinner, a dough that won't rise. Antoine answers like a head chef.

foodSafety.title: A note before we start.
foodSafety.lede: Antoine is your culinary AI. He is not a substitute for your training, your judgement, or your kitchen's safety system. A quick reminder before each session.
foodSafety.bullet1Label: Antoine is AI, not a guarantee.
foodSafety.bullet1Body: Suggestions are model-generated. Cross-check critical steps before serving — temperatures, raw protein, dietary substitutions.
foodSafety.bullet2Body: Antoine is not your food-safety system. Apply your kitchen's HACCP plan for hazard analysis, critical control points, hygiene, temperature, and storage. He will not audit your kitchen for you.
foodSafety.bullet3Body: Antoine cannot guarantee an ingredient list is allergen-safe. Always check labels yourself and confirm severe allergies with the eater.
foodSafety.bullet4Body: Nothing Antoine says is medical, nutritional, or therapeutic guidance. Speak to a registered professional for any health-driven food decision.
foodSafety.fineprint: By tapping below, you confirm you've read these and agree to the food-safety section of the Terms of Service.

onboarding.headline: Your Chef runs <script>on this phone.</script>
onboarding.lede: Pick a model once. After that, recipes, conversions, and prep stay on the device — no cloud round-trips, no leaks.
onboarding.privacy1Sub: Your kitchen IP never leaves the phone.
onboarding.privacy2Sub: No signal in the walk-in? Still answers.
onboarding.privacy3Sub: Pause and resume any time. Download policy below.
onboarding.modelMeta: 5.9 GB · runs locally on your phone
onboarding.modelDescription: This is the AI brain that powers {{assistantName}}. Downloading it once means every question — recipes, conversions, plating ideas — is answered on your phone, with no internet. Nothing you ask leaves the device.
onboarding.cellularWarningBody: Antoine is about 6 GB. Downloading on cellular may use significant data and could be slow.
